formdata.description: 出口国家（海关国家列表获取id）
进口国家（海关国家列表获取id）
区分进出口数据:Inport=进口数据，Export=出口数据
排除物流字符，可多个，用","相连
排除物流类型:importer=进口商,exporter=出口商,both=两者,none=不排除
当Range设置为diy时使用。导出数量起始
当Range设置为diy时使用。导出数量限制

范围：in=指定传递的海关记录的snow_flake_id来筛选数据进行导出
diy=通过筛选条件进行查找出的数据导出
值的类型是海关数据的snow_flake_id，当Range值是page时使用，可传递多个
海关记录id(snow_flake_id)，（从某条海关记录进入，对应海关记录的id）
海关记录日期(date)，（从某条海关记录进入，对应海关记录的日期）

            "postal_code": "97070",
            "short_description": "HERE'S WHAT OUR EMPLOYEES ARE SAYING\n\n\"This company is a friendly and inviting place to be and, being a part of that has been a joy for me. I love the fact that when I return to work from a resting weekend, I do not dread it. I enjoy my work environment as well as my coworkers and management. If you enjoy a family-like environment and are looking for one as your place of employment, AOSOM is a great place to be.\"​\n\n- Melissa\n\nOUR PASSION\n\nWe're here to inspire our Aosom fans with quality home goods at affordable prices. Whether you need inspiration to add that perfect piece to your living room or if you need a whole new patio set that glows with a fire pit, we've got you covered.  From beautiful new decorations in the bedroom to the bathroom, the kitchen to the home office, the exercise room to the backyard, we have everything you need to create your dream home – and to entertain in it. The Aosom family of brands include: \n\n•\tQaba – the first place parents look for new indoor and outdoor toys for their children\n•\tHomCom – where style meets affordable home décor\n•\tPawhut – give your indoor and outdoor pets the comfort that they deserve\n•\tSoozier – a collection of health and fitness equipment to help you look and feel your best\n•\tOutsunny – Elegant outdoor pieces to help you transform your outdoor space\n\nAosom was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Wilsonville, OR with warehouses in Oregon and Tennessee. We serve customers in the lower 48 states providing high quality products at really good prices. You can find our products featured on amazon, eBay, Wayfair, Sears, Walmart, Newegg and Hayneedle. \n\nSTAYING CONNECTED\n\nJoin us in our mission to provide our customers with the best quality service. Stay connected through our blog and on Facebook, Pinterest, YouTube, and Twitter. So if you have any questions, comments, suggestions give us a call at 1-877-644-9366 or send an email to customerservice@aosom.com",
